calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-26-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Scott Hodges, Conservator of the State of the State of the person and the Estate of Rufino De Luna is present.
Attorney Daniel Conrad appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Rosephine Cervania and Richard Cervania are present.
Attorney Dennis Sinclitico representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquist, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of OCT-29-2012 remains on calendar.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Off Calendar
